import torch

def rope_optimized_kernel(q, cos, sin):
    # Reshape for vectorized operations
    q_reshaped = q.view(*q.shape[:-1], -1, 2)
    cos_reshaped = cos.view(*cos.shape[:-1], -1, 1)
    sin_reshaped = sin.view(*sin.shape[:-1], -1, 1)
    
    # Extract even and odd components
    q_even = q_reshaped[..., 0]
    q_odd = q_reshaped[..., 1]
    
    # Squeeze the last dimension for broadcasting
    c = cos_reshaped.squeeze(-1)
    s = sin_reshaped.squeeze(-1)
    
    # Compute rotated components
    rotated_even = q_even * c - q_odd * s
    rotated_odd = q_even * s + q_odd * c
    
    # Stack and reshape back
    result = torch.stack([rotated_even, rotated_odd], dim=-1)
    return result.view_as(q)
